allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ScheduledTask | Where-Object { $_.TaskName -match ''shut|sleep|hibernate|power|off'' -or $_.Description -match ''shut|sleep|power'' } | Select-Object TaskName, TaskPath, State | Format-List")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ScheduledTask | Where-Object { $_TaskName -match ''shut|sleep|hibernate|power'' } | Select-Object TaskName, TaskPath, State | Format-List")
